title: Pan-Seared Peruvian Stir Fry with Tofu
description: A flavorful and spicy stir fry dish from Peru, made with crispy tofu and a hint of stir-fry sauce. Quick and easy to make, this dish is perfect for a weeknight dinner.

ingredients.name: tofu
ingredients.notes: drained and cut into small cubes

ingredients.name: buttery stir fry sauce
ingredients.notes: available in most supermarkets or online

ingredients.name: peruvian stir fry mix
ingredients.notes: available in most supermarkets or online

instructions: Heat the oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the tofu and cook until golden brown, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the peruvian stir fry mix and stir-fry sauce to the skillet, and cook for 1-2 minutes.
Stir in the green onions and season with salt and pepper to taste.
